Persistent map implementation and management functions for UUID-to-ID mapping in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[persist_map.c](persist_map.c.md)**: Implements a persistent map for storing and retrieving UUIDs with associated IDs, including file management and diagnostic functions.
- **[persist_map.h](persist_map.h.md)**: Functions for managing a UUID-to-ID mapping system in the Pebble firmware.
